seoTitle: Coodanup vs Coogee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coodanup and Coogee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coodanup and Coogee.
heading: Coodanup vs Coogee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coodanup, Western Australia and Coogee, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coodanup has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Coogee (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coodanup or Coogee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coodanup has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Coogee scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coodanup scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Coogee scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coodanup or Coogee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coodanup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
